content: KV-cache compression landscape: four levers = architecture (GQA/MQA), quantization, paging (PagedAttention/vLLM, 90%+ util), eviction. Quantization: QAQ achieves ~10x KV compression via separate key/value quant + outlier handling, negligible quality loss. Eviction: StreamingLLM attention-sinks (first 4 tokens) + sliding window; H2O; SnapKV/Ada-SnapKV; KV-Compress does block-wise eviction with variable rate per head/layer + GQA query-group-compression (4x extra on Mistral/Llama-3.1). Eviction incompatible with PagedAttention unless block-wise (PagedEviction/KV-Compress). INT8 KV cache is the production minimum bar (vLLM/SGLang). Spectral-Stream already has KVCacheManager with 30+ policies — ahead of table stakes here, but CPU-only so paging/FlashAttention infra features don't apply.
